overview: Based on the published agenda, this special meeting of the Wausau School District Board of Education was scheduled to consider personnel actions including appointments, separations, leaves of absence, and retirements. The board was expected to vote on a consent agenda containing staffing changes and related human resources matters.

discussions.body: The board was expected to consider a consent agenda encompassing four categories of personnel actions: appointments of additional and replacement staff with contract increases, separations including resignations, contract decreases and terminations, leaves of absence, and retirements. The consent agenda packet was last modified on June 18, 2026.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on approval of the consent agenda containing personnel appointments, separations, leaves of absence, and retirements
title: Special Meeting - 2026-06-22
